title: The Blade of the Ruined King
description: The BOTRK mod adds several League of Legends items to Minecraft, perfect to spice up vanilla gameplay.
body:
The Blade of the Ruined King mod adds several League of Legends items to Minecraft. 

This currently involves the following Legendary Items:
- The Blade of the Ruined King
- The Collector
- Infinity Edge
- Bloodthirster
- Zhonya's Hourglass
- Opportunity

And the following non-Legendary Items:
- Dagger
- Recurve Bow
- B.F. Sword
- Serrated Dirk
- Vamphiric Scepter
- Seeker's Armguard

All of which will work as expected to their League counterparts, with a slight change in statistics to fit Minecraft more. All of the items are obtainable in survival. Some Legendary Item's crafting recipe is more League like, requiring similar material (e.g. Blade of the Ruined King), while some require less League material (e.g. Zhonya's and Opportuniy). This is due to the fact that I have not added all items from League to 1:1 replicate League's crafting system, and also because I haven't thought of a reseanable counterpart for most of the AP scaling items.

More info see images.
